_doc: PR1 #9 DRIFT GATE fixture — modify-component on a nonexistent target. Expected: failure with the canonical "Component <id> not found" message produced by ComponentManager.update. Tightened from the original loose 'not found|Component' regex (adversarial review 2026-04-26 flagged that the alternation matched any message containing the literal English word 'Component', including hypothetical regression messages like 'Modified Component XYZ').
